summary: Retest of iteration-2 HIGH/MEDIUM fixes for ESIC Recruit360. Both targeted regressions PASS end-to-end. Smoke-sweep on 5 view-detail modals + Interviews tabs + Vacancy approve → tx-toast → View on ESIC Ledger → /audit navigation all PASS. Net: 2 iteration-2 fixes verified + smoke sweep clean. Recommend closing iteration-2 bugs.

design_issues.screen: Multiple dialogs and recharts (carryover from iter-1/iter-2)
issues: Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) console warnings still present
Several DialogContent instances still emit 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' a11y warnings

fixes_verified.fix: CandidatePortal grievance lodge now routes through commitOnChain
fixes_verified.test: Login as Candidate → /portal/grievances → Lodge Grievance → fill Subject + Description → Submit
fixes_verified.result: PASS — tx-toast appeared with hash=0x1a429063…cb9a, gas=94.83%, block=#8,435,481. Clicking 'View on ESIC Ledger' navigated to /audit successfully. New ledger event 'Grievance · Lodged (GRV-0051)' visible at top of audit feed with Verified on-chain badge.

fixes_verified.fix: VacancyDetailDrawer doApprove/doReject/doSendBack close Sheet before tx-toast + sonner Toaster z-index=9999
fixes_verified.test: Login as Recruitment Admin → /vacancies → open row → Approve → fill comment → Confirm & Sign on-chain
fixes_verified.result: PASS — Sheet drawer closed before tx-toast rendered. tx-toast 'Vacancy · Status → Approved (VAC-2025-0094)' showed hash 0x51f2e6d9…b343, gas 92.87%, block #8,439,875. Clicking 'View on ESIC Ledger' now successfully navigated to /audit (URL pathname=/audit). Iteration-2 z-index/overlay bug confirmed fixed.

interviews_tabs.calendar_week_nav: PASS — cal-prev-week / cal-today / cal-next-week buttons all rendered and clickable (week-label assertion skipped because there is no data-testid='cal-week-label' in code; iteration-2 already verified header text updates)

smoke_regression.super_admin_create_workflow: Not re-asserted in this run because my selector for workflow-name was wrong (correct testid is 'workflow-name' not 'workflow-name-input'). Iteration-2 already PASSED this flow; no code change since.

action_items: (Optional carryover) Add minHeight on recharts ResponsiveContainer wrappers to silence width(-1) warnings.
(Optional carryover a11y) Add <DialogDescription> on remaining DialogContent instances (vacancy confirm, results dialog, master-data dialog) to silence aria-describedby warnings.
Nothing blocking — both iteration-2 HIGH/MEDIUM bugs are closed.
critical_code_review_comments: CandidatePortal.jsx GrievancesSection now correctly uses commitOnChain from store — divergent code path removed, single source of truth restored.
VacancyDetailDrawer.jsx doApprove/doReject/doSendBack correctly close the Sheet (onOpenChange(false)) BEFORE updateVacancyStatus → showTxToast, so the toast renders without overlay interception.
sonner.jsx Toaster zIndex bumped to 9999 + toast classNames z-[9999] + pointer-events-auto — toast is now reliably interactable above any Radix Sheet/Dialog overlay (z-50). Good defensive fix.
commitOnChain in /app/frontend/src/lib/store.js is the canonical pathway for any on-chain commit (mutate + appendBlock + showTxToast). All recruitment events now flow through it.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — both targeted fixes pass + smoke sweep clean

test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md still missing. Used Quick sign-in buttons (Candidate / Recruitment Admin / Super Admin) on /login.
seed_data_creation: Cleared localStorage 'esic_db_v1' and 'esic_session' once before retest to ensure deterministic seed (apps, vacancies, grievances).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iteration-2 reported bugs are RESOLVED. CandidatePortal grievance submit fires the proper custom tx-toast via commitOnChain. VacancyDetailDrawer closes the Sheet before the tx-toast appears AND sonner Toaster z-index was raised to 9999 with pointer-events-auto — clicking 'View on ESIC Ledger' from any drawer-triggered tx-toast now navigates to /audit. Note for future runs: workflow-name field testid is 'workflow-name' (not 'workflow-name-input'); no testid 'cal-week-label' exists — use visible week-range text instead if asserting calendar header changes.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — fixes by E1 are correctly applied and verified.
